title: cleome schraderi
intro: Cleome schraderi is a plant species, also known as the velvet trumpet or Schrader's cleome, which belongs to the Cleomaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cleome schraderi include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight against infections. Herbal preparations of Cleome schraderi can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extract in the form of capsules or tinctures.
